metadata.note: Contains nested fields: g:price, g:country, g:service, g:min_handling_time, g:max_handling_time, g:min_transit_time, g:max_transit_time

method.step: Compute shipping price: if product price > `kwota_dla_darmowej_dostawy` then 0 else `Koszt_dostawy` or overridden by `kwota_dla_wiekszych_zamowien` logic.
Set country from `Kraj_dostawy` and service from `Serwis_dostawy_zamówienia`.
Set handling and transit times from configured variables.
